When to use:

Choose and implement Vue state patterns including local refs, composables, URL state, Pinia stores, and server/cache state. Use when fixing prop drilling, inconsistent shared state, stale async data, or deciding between composables, Pinia, and query libraries like TanStack Query in Vue apps.
